response.overview: This short documentary follows Alefya Hussain Talib, a mother whose observations about how children learn through play led her to rethink the way toys and learning are approached. Through her experiences with her own children, she realized that traditional methods of learning often overlook the importance of curiosity, exploration, and play in a child’s cognitive development. The film focuses on her reflections on childhood learning, the psychology behind play, and how a simple problem in her everyday life sparked the idea that later became Mera Khilona.
response.title: Khilonay
